## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] `cd desktop && npx tsc --noEmit` passes (if frontend changed)
- [ ] Updated docs/CHANGELOG if user-facing
